title: Cluster Autoscaler vs Pod Disruption Budgets - The Scale-Down Deadlock
description: In this lab you will diagnose a cluster autoscaler scale-down deadlock caused by conflicting Pod Disruption Budget configurations. You will examine the autoscaler logs to identify which PDB is blocking eviction, understand why the current configuration creates a deadlock, and modify the PDB to allow safe node scale-down while maintaining the required availability guarantees.
